summary: JIT (Just-in-Time) Temporary Leader feature fully tested. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - JIT button visible, dialog works with member/duration selectors, Acting badge displays with countdown, orange banner shows inside expanded subgroup, revoke functionality works correctly.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Backend _can_assign_temp_leader correctly allows: admins, super_admins, Tech Support division, OR subgroup's current leader
Current leader rejection prevents leader from being assigned as temp leader
GET /api/division-groups correctly returns temp_leader_active, temp_leader object, and temp_leader_end for countdown
Frontend timeRemaining() function correctly calculates countdown from temp_leader_end ISO timestamp
Frontend conditionally shows JIT button vs Revoke button based on temp_leader_active state
Orange Acting badge visible on subgroup header with countdown timer
Orange banner inside expanded subgroup shows temp leader name and remaining time
context_for_next_testing_agent: JIT Temporary Leader feature fully tested and working. Key tests verified: 1) POST /api/subgroups/{id}/temp-leader assigns temp leader with duration_hours (min 1hr, max 2 weeks). 2) Validation: rejects duration < 1hr, non-member, current leader. 3) DELETE /api/subgroups/{id}/temp-leader revokes temp leader. 4) GET /api/division-groups returns temp_leader_active=true with temp_leader object when active. 5) Frontend shows JIT button on subgroups for admin/super_admin/Tech Support/subgroup leader. 6) Dialog has member selector (excluding current leader) and duration dropdown (1hr to 2 weeks). 7) Acting badge (orange) shows on subgroup header with countdown. 8) Orange banner inside expanded subgroup shows 'X is acting as temporary leader' with remaining time. 9) Revoke button replaces JIT button when temp leader active. 10) After revoke, badge/banner removed and JIT button returns.

Backend_API_Tests.assign_temp_leader_success: PASS - Returns 200 with temp_leader_id, start, end, duration_hours
Backend_API_Tests.reject_duration_less_than_1hr: PASS - 400 error with 'at least 1 hour' message
Backend_API_Tests.reject_non_member: PASS - 400 error with 'member of the subgroup' message

Frontend_UI_Tests.JIT_button_visible_on_subgroup: PASS - Clock icon with JIT text visible for admin
Frontend_UI_Tests.JIT_dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog with member selector and duration dropdown
Frontend_UI_Tests.duration_options_1hr_to_2weeks: PASS - Options from 1 Hour to 2 Weeks available
Frontend_UI_Tests.acting_badge_shows_countdown: PASS - Orange badge shows 'Acting: Leah Masemene (1h 59m)'
Frontend_UI_Tests.orange_banner_inside_subgroup: PASS - Banner shows 'Leah Masemene is acting as temporary leader'
Frontend_UI_Tests.revoke_button_visible: PASS - Red X with 'Revoke' text replaces JIT button
